objective: Faster, more accurate risk selection + dynamic pricing across B2C, B2B, B2E.
main_kpi: Underwriting cycle time; STP rate; loss ratio; combined ratio

tab_content.Overview: Web Application supports Application Submission in Underwriting.
tab_content.Inputs: Primary inputs come from Underwriting systems, customer/broker channels, documents, and external insurance data feeds.
tab_content.AI: Relevant AI agents: Application Intake Agent, Document Verification Agent, Risk Scoring Agent, Pricing Agent.
tab_content.Outputs: Outputs include workflow decisions, recommendations, explanations, audit rows, and role dashboard signals for Underwriting.
tab_content.KPIs: Underwriting cycle time; STP rate; loss ratio; combined ratio
tab_content.Governance: Tenant-scoped, role-scoped, PII-redacted by default, and audited per decision.
